deploy.preDeployCommand: echo PATH=$PATH; echo WHICH_PYTHON=$(which python); python -m site; find / -maxdepth 6 -iname 'alembic*' -not -path '/proc/*' 2>/dev/null
deploy.startCommand: cd backend && export PATH="/app/.venv/bin:$PATH" && export PYTHONPATH=src:.. && python -m alembic upgrade head && exec python -m uvicorn asa.asgi:create_application --factory --host 0.0.0.0 --port "${PORT}"
